markets.question: Another US debt downgrade before 2027?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the United States' long-term sovereign credit letter rating is downgraded by any of the three major credit rating agencies (S&P, Moody's, Fitch) at any point by December 31, 2026 11:59pm ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

The resolution source for this market will be official information from Standard & Poor's, Moody's, or Fitch, however a consensus of credible reporting will also be used.

events.title: Another US debt downgrade before 2027?
events.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the United States' long-term sovereign credit letter rating is downgraded by any of the three major credit rating agencies (S&P, Moody's, Fitch) at any point by December 31, 2026 11:59pm ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

The resolution source for this market will be official information from Standard & Poor's, Moody's, or Fitch, however a consensus of credible reporting will also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket prices a 74.5% implied probability against another major US sovereign credit rating downgrade before 2027, reflecting Fitch Ratings' April 30, 2026 affirmation of its AA+ stable outlook despite projecting US debt-to-GDP at 122% by year-end—up from 116.6% in 2025—amid widening fiscal deficits averaging $1.9 trillion annually per CBO estimates. This stability follows Moody's Aa1 downgrade in May 2025 and prior S&P/Fitch actions, with agencies citing chronic governance gridlock but no acute triggers like debt ceiling default risks, as the $41.1 trillion limit provides headroom above current $39 trillion levels. Key catalysts include FY2027 budget talks and potential debt limit hikes, where bipartisan resolutions have historically averted crises, underscoring the resilience of US Treasuries backed by global reserve demand.

markets.question: Will Liverpool finish in the top 4 of the EPL 2025–26 standings?
markets.description:
This is a polymarket to predict which clubs finish in the top 4 of the English Premier League standings for the 2025–26 season.

If the listed club officially finishes in the top 4 of the English Premier League standings at the end of the season, the market will resolve to "Yes." Otherwise, it will resolve to "No."

If two or more clubs are tied on points for a top 4 position, resolution will follow the official English Premier League tiebreaking procedures.

If the 2025–26 English Premier League season is canceled or not completed before October 1, 2026, this market will resolve to "No."

The primary resolution source will be official information from the English Premier League. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Arsenal (76 points from 35 games) and Manchester City (71 points from 34) hold commanding leads in the Premier League table, with their superior goal differences (+41, +37) and remaining fixtures positioning them to clinch Champions League spots barring collapses. Manchester United occupy third on 64 points, six clear of Liverpool and Aston Villa—tied at 58 after 35 games, where Liverpool's +12 goal difference provides a narrow edge over Villa's +4. Liverpool's recent streak of wins over Fulham, Everton, and Crystal Palace ended in defeat at Old Trafford to United, tightening the race for fourth; three matches remain, including schedule strength and home form that could see Bournemouth (52 points) mount an unlikely challenge if favorites slip.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Milan be 18°C or higher on May 5?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Malpensa Intl Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 5 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Malpensa Intl Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/it/milan/LIMC.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Official observations from Milano Linate Airport, Italy's reference meteorological station for the city, confirm the highest temperature on May 5, 2026, peaked at 16°C around midday, under persistent overcast skies and intermittent showers driven by a low-pressure system over northern Italy. This marked a sharp drop from prior days' highs near 25°C, as northerly airflow and cloud cover suppressed solar heating, aligning with consensus from ECMWF and Italian Air Force Meteorological Service forecasts predicting 15–17°C maxima. Trader consensus at 100% implied probability for 16°C reflects finalized hourly data with no readings at or above 17°C. A realistic challenge would involve post-processing quality control uncovering a higher unverified peak from a secondary station, though Linate's measurement governs resolution.

markets.question: Will Elon Musk post 760-779 tweets in May 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the number of times Elon Musk (@elonmusk), posts on X during the month of May 2026.

For the purposes of this market, only main feed posts, quote posts and reposts will count.

Replies will NOT count towards the total - however, replies on the main feed such as https://x.com/elonmusk/status/1786073478711353576 will be counted by the tracker.

Deleted posts will count as long as they remain available long enough to be captured by the tracker (~5 minutes).

Community reposts which are not counted by the tracker not count toward the total.

The resolution source for this market is the 'Post Counter' figure for posts found at https://xtracker.polymarket.com. Individual posts can be viewed by clicking "Export Data". If the tracker does not update correctly in accordance with the rules, X itself may be used as a secondary resolution source.

markets.question: Will Philadelphia Union win the 2026 MLS Cup?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the team that wins the 2026 MLS Cup. 

If at any point it becomes impossible for a listed team to win the 2026 MLS Cup per the rules of MLS (e.g. they are mathematically eliminated), the corresponding market will resolve to “No”.

If the 2026 MLS season is cancelled, postponed after December 31, 2026 ET, or there is otherwise no winner declared within that timeframe, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source will be official information from Major League Soccer; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

markets.question: Will the Fed’s lower bound reach 0.5% or lower before 2027?
markets.description:
The FED interest rates are defined in this market by the lower or the upper bound of the target federal funds range. The decisions on the target federal fund range are made by the Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) meetings.

This market will resolve to “Yes” if the lower or the upper bound of the target federal funds rate reaches the specified level at any point by December 31, 2026, 12:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No.”

Emergency rate cuts and hikes outside the regularly scheduled meetings will be considered.

The resolution source for this market is the official website of the Federal Reserve at:
https://www.federalreserve.gov/monetarypolicy/openmarket.htm.

This market may resolve as soon as the relevant data showing the reached level is published.

eventMetadata.context_description: The Federal Reserve maintained its federal funds target range at 3.50%-3.75% following the April 29, 2026 FOMC meeting, reflecting trader consensus on a cautious stance amid resurgent inflation—March CPI accelerated to 3.3% year-over-year, the highest in nearly two years, driven by energy price surges—and a softening labor market with unemployment steady at 4.3%. The effective federal funds rate stands at 3.64%, with futures markets implying near-certainty of no change at the June 16-17 meeting. Polymarket sentiment aggregates real-capital bets on whether bounds hit specific levels before year-end 2026, shaped by incoming data risks; key catalysts include April CPI on May 12 and subsequent FOMC deliberations, where sustained inflation above 2% could delay easing or prompt hikes.

markets.question: Will Gainare Tottori win on 2026-04-05?
markets.description:
In the upcoming game, scheduled for April 5, 2026
If Gainare Tottori wins, this market will resolve to "Yes".
Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve "No".

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

eventMetadata.context_description: Bournemouth's higher Premier League standing around 6th-8th versus Fulham's mid-table position near 11th, coupled with their dominant head-to-head record—seven wins in recent meetings including a 3-1 victory last October—positions them as slim trader favorites at 39.5% implied probability. However, Fulham's home form at Craven Cottage and mixed recent results, including a win and draw in their last two, keep the contest razor-tight with just a 4% gap to their 35.5%. Key for traders: Fulham's injury concerns, with Alex Iwobi (hamstring) and Ryan Sessegnon (muscle) sidelined after last weekend's limp-off, disrupting left-flank balance and creativity, while Kenny Tete may return off the bench; Bournemouth largely healthy post their 3-0 thrashing of Crystal Palace. Draw at 25.5% reflects evenly matched mid-table stakes with no major relegation or European pressure.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Chicago be 47°F or below on May 6?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Chicago O'Hare Intl Airport Station in degrees Fahrenheit on 6 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Chicago O'Hare Intl Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/us/il/chicago/KORD.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Fahrenheit (eg, 21°F). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket reflects tight uncertainty in National Weather Service forecasts for Chicago's O'Hare International Airport, where the official high temperature will resolve the market, with models clustering around 56-59°F under mostly cloudy skies and scattered morning showers. Recent NWS updates indicate a lingering weak cold front and cool mid-level air mass aloft—500 mb temperatures near -10°C—capping highs well below the 67°F climatological normal for May 6, as persistent cloud cover limits surface heating and light southerly winds (5-10 mph) hinder boundary-layer mixing. Differentiation between 56-57°F and 58-59°F hinges on afternoon clearing speed and urban heat contributions, with ensemble guidance from GFS and ECMWF showing minor spread; watch for hourly forecast tweaks this afternoon ahead of tomorrow's resolution.

markets.question: Will T1 make a roster change before July?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if any player joins or leaves T1's active League of Legends roster (defined as the active lineup listed on the T1 Liquipedia page: https://liquipedia.net/leagueoflegends/T1) by June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

As of market creation the active roster consists of the following players: Doran, Oner, Faker, Peyz, and Keria. Name changes or aliases referring to the same player do not qualify as roster changes.

For the purpose of this market, "roster change" refers to any official signing, transfer, benching to inactive/reserve, release, retirement, or departure of a player from the active lineup. This includes adding new players (transfers, free agent signings, or loans), removing players (to inactive, free agency, or other teams), or any change resulting in a different active roster.

Coach changes and temporary stand-ins for a single match will not count.

The primary resolution source for this market will be Liquipedia; however a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: T1's competitive 6-3 record in the LCK 2026 Spring Split, placing them third behind dominant Hanwha Life Esports and KT Rolster, balances trader sentiment on roster stability versus adjustment needs, with Yes at 53% reflecting Doran's contract expiring at season's end amid the team's recovery from an early 3-3 slump. Iga Swiatek trails at 12% despite No. 3 ranking, hampered by recent clay-court struggles that dropped her position and underscore surface-specific vulnerabilities. Xiyu Wang's 9% signals breakout potential as a lefty upset artist, though her challenger-level results temper expectations in this wide-open Grand Slam field with multiple top-10 threats like Anisimova and Andreeva lurking.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket reflects a closely contested Kansas Republican gubernatorial primary, with Senate President Ty Masterson leading former Gov. Jeff Colyer at 47.5% to 38.5% implied probabilities ahead of the August 4 plurality-vote contest for the open seat. The tight race stems from a crowded field splintering support, split straw poll results at activist events like Kansans for Life gatherings where both topped separate surveys, and parity in fundraising fueled by personal loans from self-funded millionaire candidates reported in January. eventMetadata.context_description: Apple maintains a commanding position as the implied third-largest company by market capitalization at end-May, with Polymarket traders assigning a 92% probability backed by its $4.16 trillion valuation—$1.12 trillion ahead of fourth-ranked Microsoft ($3.04 trillion) and trailing second-place Alphabet ($4.63 trillion) by $470 billion. This strong consensus reflects recent market stabilization after Alphabet's sharp rally surpassing Apple and Microsoft earlier this month, widening gaps that would require implausibly rapid 35-40% gains for challengers like Microsoft, Amazon, or Broadcom to overtake amid moderate trading volumes and steady megacap performance (Apple +2.6% over the past month). Realistic challenges include blowout earnings from Microsoft or Broadcom, a broader tech sector rotation favoring laggards, or macroeconomic shocks eroding leaders' premiums before resolution.

markets.question: T20 World Cup, East Asia-Pacific Qualifier, Regional Final: Philippines vs Indonesia - Toss Match Double Philippines Winner
markets.description:
This market refers to the combination of the pre-match coin toss and the final match result for the cricket match between Philippines and Indonesia scheduled for 2026-05-07 in T20 World Cup, East Asia-Pacific Qualifier, Regional Final.
This market resolves according to (1) the official toss result and (2) the finalized match result as published by https://www.espncricinfo.com/.
The outcome corresponding to Philippines will be considered correct if  Philippines is officially recorded as winning both the toss and the match.
The outcome corresponding to Indonesia will be considered correct if Indonesia is officially recorded as winning both the toss and the match.
In all other cases - including where the toss and match winners differ, or where no match winner is recorded - the market will resolve to Neither.
DLS/DRS adjustments, over-rate penalties, forfeit/walkover, Super Over, or any other on-field ruling that leads the competition to declare a match winner are treated as ordinary wins. If the match ends tied and the playing conditions provide an on-field tiebreak (e.g., Super Over), the tiebreak winner will be considered the match winner for this market. If the match ends tied with no tiebreak used or available, no team will be considered to have won the match and the market will resolve to Neither.
If the match is permanently canceled, abandoned, or otherwise completed without an official match winner being declared, the market will resolve to Neither.
If the match is postponed or rescheduled, the market remains open until the listed fixture is completed and will then resolve as described above.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus prices the toss at even 50% implied probabilities for Philippines, Indonesia, and draw in this Group 2 opener of the ICC Men's T20 World Cup East Asia-Pacific Qualifier 2026 at neutral Sano International Cricket Ground, Japan, on May 8, underscoring the coin flip's randomness with no captain or venue bias evident. Philippines enter with strong recent form, winning four of their last five T20Is against Indonesia—including a dominant 78-run victory on December 11, 2025—and boasting a W L W W W W streak, while Indonesia slumped to a loss against Malaysia on May 1 amid an L L W L L L run. Absent pitch reports or weather updates, teams lack clear preference for batting or bowling first, keeping the pre-match ritual tightly contested.

markets.question: Spread: IK Start (-1.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming Norway Eliteserien game, scheduled for May 16 at 10:00 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "IK Start" if IK Start win the game by 2 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Viking FK".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on eliteserien.no. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Viking FK vs. IK Start - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the Norway Eliteserien game, scheduled for May 16 at 10:00 AM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: Viking FK, the defending Eliteserien champions, host struggling IK Start on May 16 at SR-Bank Arena, with traders eyeing Viking's strong early-season form placing them around third in the table after solid results including high-scoring wins. Start, newly promoted alongside Lillestrøm and Aalesund, languish near the relegation zone with just two points from four games marked by draws and losses, conceding heavily. Head-to-head favors Viking with eight wins in the last 14 meetings. Key absences include Viking goalkeepers Arild Østbø and Edvin Austbø plus defender Martin Ove Roseth, while Start misses Fredrik Pålerud, Johan Meyer, and Steve Mvoué; home advantage and superior squad depth tilt trader consensus toward the hosts amid Start's defensive woes.

markets.question: Will Trump and Putin meet next in another EU country?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the location of the next meeting between Donald Trump and Vladimir Putin between September 30 and June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET.

This market will resolve to "No meeting by June 30" if no qualifying meeting occurs during this market's timeframe.

A meeting is defined as any encounter where Putin and Trump are all present and interact with each other in person.

An exchange of words, handshake, direct conversation, or other clear personal interaction between the named individuals will qualify as a meeting. Merely standing in proximity, making eye contact, or being present in the same room or event without direct interaction will not qualify.

For this market, Gulf states are defined as the six members of the Gulf Cooperation Council (Bahrain, Kuwait, Oman, Qatar, Saudi Arabia, United Arab Emirates).

The primary resolution source for this market will be a consensus of credible reporting.

markets.question: Yoon out of custody before 2027?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if President of South Korea Yoon Suk Yeol is released from custody by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

If Yoon is released but remains under house arrest, the market will still resolve to "Yes".

If Yoon is released on parole, bond, or any other condition that results in them leaving state custody, the market will resolve to "Yes".

Transporting Yoon to another location of custody (e.g., a different prison, court, or hospital within the correctional system) will not suffice to resolve this market to "Yes".

If Yoon is released but remains under house arrest, the market will still resolve to "Yes".

If Yoon is released on parole, bond, or any other condition that results in them leaving state custody, the market will resolve to "Yes".

Transporting Yoon to another location of custody (e.g., a different prison, court, or hospital within the correctional system) will not suffice to resolve this market to "Yes".

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from government authorities or corrections departments; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Former South Korean President Yoon Suk-yeol remains in custody following his February 2026 conviction and life sentence for insurrection tied to the 2024 martial law declaration, with an appeals court on April 29 increasing his term to seven years for obstruction of arrest. These severe penalties, upheld amid multiple detention warrant extensions, reflect judicial consensus on charges from the political crisis that led to his impeachment and ouster by the Constitutional Court in April 2025. Absent successful higher appeals or extraordinary pardons—unlikely given the timeline to December 31, 2026—traders price a 92.5% implied probability of "No," emphasizing entrenched legal barriers over release scenarios.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Houston be between 82-83°F on May 6?
markets.description:

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the William P. Hobby Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/us/tx/houston/KHOU.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Fahrenheit (eg, 21°F). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

Recent heavy rainfall through May 1—dropping highs to the 70s and saturating soils—has introduced lingering cloud cover and evaporative cooling, capping extremes below 90°F per GFS and European model ensembles, though dry air advection could nudge peaks higher. Watch NWS updates and 12z model runs on May 5 for refinements ahead of resolution.

markets.question: Will UBS or any of its underwriting affiliates serve as the lead underwriter in SpaceX’s initial public offering?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the bank that serves as the lead underwriter in the initial public offering of SpaceX.

If no IPO occurs by December 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, or SpaceX completes an initial public offering without a designated lead underwriter, this market will resolve to “Other.”

If multiple banks are identified as lead underwriters, this market will resolve according to the primary lead underwriter. If the hierarchy between them is unclear, this market will resolve once it is conclusively evident which bank is the primary lead underwriter, for example, through the order in which the banks are listed in the underwriting section of SpaceX’s final initial public offering prospectus, once released.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official disclosures from SpaceX. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

Recent Bloomberg and Reuters disclosures from late March and early April 2026 confirm Morgan Stanley alongside Goldman Sachs (17.5%) and Bank of America (15.4%) as active bookrunners in the 21-bank "Project Apex" syndicate, with no traditional "lead left" position; banks will share roles alphabetically for the June roadshow targeting a $1.75 trillion-plus valuation fueled by Starlink's satellite constellation and Starship reusability milestones. Prospectus expected late May, with retail allocation up to 30% signaling broad investor access amid xAI merger synergies.

markets.question: Will the Republican Party win the SC-02 House seat?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the party of the candidate who wins the SC-02 congressional district seat in the U.S. House of Representatives in the 2026 midterm elections. The midterm elections will take place on November 4, 2026.

​A candidate's party will be determined by their ballot-listed or otherwise identifiable affiliation with that party at the time all of the 2026 House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources. A candidate without a ballot-listed affiliation to either the Democrat or Republican parties will be considered a member of one of these parties based on the party with which they most recently expressed their intent to caucus at the time all of the House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources.

This market will resolve based on the result of the election as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the United States government, specifically the Federal Election Commission (https://www.fec.gov/).

Democratic Party odds languish at 18% against a fragmented primary field of Zyon Khalifa, Roger Pruitt, David Robinson II, and Daniel Shrief, lacking competitive finance or polling. Candidate-specific outcomes A, B, and Other hover near 50% due to low-volume pre-primary uncertainty ahead of June 9 nominating contests, with no major developments in the past 30 days altering the structural GOP advantage.

Mainly cloudy skies with moderate easterly winds and scattered rain patches suppressed radiative cooling, preventing deeper lows typical of clearer nights, while regional stations like Cheung Chau logged 20.6°C. This marks below the climatological May overnight average near 23°C, reflecting short-term monsoon moderation over seasonal norms. Overnight readings holding around 21°C with forecasts for a 21°C minimum render further drops improbable barring unexpected clear skies or wind shifts before midnight. HKO's final daily report will confirm resolution.

markets.question: Will North and South Korea engage in direct talks by June 30?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if, North and South Korea engage in direct talks, defined as an official meeting or communication between government representatives of both sides, conducted without a third-party relaying messages, by June 30, 2026 at 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise this market will resolve to “No”.

The talks may be in-person, by phone, or virtual, and must be publicly acknowledged by either government or reported by credible media. 

Routine military deconfliction, backchannel exchanges, or talks conducted entirely through another country or organization will not count. 

The resolutions source will be a consensus of credible reporting.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus heavily favors no direct talks between North and South Korea by June 30, reflecting Pyongyang's entrenched rejection of inter-Korean dialogue amid its "two hostile states" policy toward Seoul. Despite South Korean President Lee Jae-myung's repeated calls for renewed negotiations since March and a brief thaw in early April—sparked by Seoul's apology for a civilian rally and reciprocal positive rhetoric—North Korea clarified on April 8 it seeks no clashes but explicitly rules out talks. No summits, working-level meetings, or official channels have been announced, with Kim Jong Un prioritizing military ties to Russia and signaling openness to separate U.S. diplomacy. Absent major de-escalation signals or scheduled diplomacy on the Korean Peninsula, traders see significant barriers to direct engagement within the timeline.

markets.question: Games Total: O/U 2.5
markets.description:
This market refers to the LoL Upper bracket quarterfinal 3 match between TLN Pirates and Esprit Shōnen in the LFL Playoffs, initially scheduled for May 6 at 12:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "Over" if TLN Pirates and Esprit Shōnen play 3 or more games in this series.

If fewer than 3 games are played, this market will resolve to "Under".

Games won by forfeit, disqualification, walkover, or default are counted towards the total, provided that the match is completed.

If the match is canceled (not played at all for any reason), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's match forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends due to the clinching game being forfeited this will count as a completed match.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

events.title: LoL: TLN Pirates vs Esprit Shōnen (BO3) - LFL Playoffs
events.description:
This market refers to the LoL Upper bracket quarterfinal 3 match between TLN Pirates and Esprit Shōnen in the LFL Playoffs, initially scheduled for May 6 at 12:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "TLN Pirates" if TLN Pirates win the match against Esprit Shōnen.

This market will resolve to "Esprit Shōnen" if Esprit Shōnen win the match against TLN Pirates.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: TLN Pirates, fresh off a dominant 7-2 regular season finish as the No. 2 seed in LFL 2026 Spring, face No. 7 Esprit Shōnen in the upper bracket quarterfinals BO3 on May 6 under fearless draft rules. Pirates capped the round-robin with a 1-0 win over Shōnen on May 1, extending their head-to-head edge amid just two losses all split to teams like Vitality.Bee and ZYB Esport. Shōnen's 3-6 record reflects inconsistency despite a stable roster featuring xKenzuke mid and Mxe support, while Pirates' core of Spooder top, Stefan jungle, and Toffe mid drives trader consensus toward their seeding advantage in this double-elimination playoff path to EMEA Masters qualification. No roster changes or substitutes reported post-regular season.

markets.question: Will Marco Rubio say "Diplomacy" during press briefing today?
markets.description:
Marco Rubio is scheduled to participate in a press briefing on May 5, 2026, 3PM ET (https://rollcall.com/factbase/trump/calendar/). 

This market will resolve to "Yes" if Marco Rubio says the listed term during the press briefing scheduled for May 5, 2026. Otherwise, the market will resolve to "No".

If clips of old interviews or prerecorded videos are aired where Rubio is speaking, those clips will count toward this market's resolution.

Plural and possessive forms of the listed term will count toward the resolution of this market regardless of context; however, other forms will NOT count.

Instances where the term is used in a compound word will count regardless of context (e.g., joyful is not a compound word for "joy," however, "killjoy" is a compounding of the words "kill" and "joy").

If this market requires a specified number of mentions of a person’s first or last name, a full-name mention will count as one mention (e.g., if a market is about “Joe / Biden 5+ times,” a mention of “Joe Biden” will count once).

This market is explicitly about the event titled "Press Briefing by the Secretary of State Marco Rubio" scheduled for May 5, 2026, 3PM ET (https://rollcall.com/factbase/trump/calendar/). Speeches, events, or comments that occur outside of the named, scheduled event will not qualify toward this market's resolution. If the event contains a Q&A, it will count toward the resolution of this market.

AI-generated audio or video will not count toward this market's resolution.

If this event is definitively cancelled, or otherwise is not aired by May 5, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, "-No Qualifying Event-" will resolve to "Yes" and all other brackets will resolve to "No". 

The resolution source will be video of the events. Only remarks which are broadcast or streamed live will count toward this market's resolution.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Fahrenheit (eg, 21°F). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: A potent cold air mass ushering in a Winter Storm Watch through May 6 afternoon has driven Polymarket traders to price the highest temperature in Denver around 36-39°F, per National Weather Service guidance showing highs near 43°F dropping to the upper 30s under rain-to-snow showers and 90% precipitation odds. Persistent cloud cover, upslope moisture, and potential thunder limit solar heating at Denver's mile-high elevation, where May cold snaps occur in about 40% of years with lingering arctic air. Close odds between 34-39°F bins reflect forecast model spread—such as GFS vs. NAM ensembles—on snow onset timing and peak-hour warmth; updated hourly data and afternoon briefings from NWS Boulder could tip the balance before resolution.

markets.question: Will New Slovenia – Christian Democrats (NSi) be part of the next Government of Slovenia?
markets.description:
Parliamentary elections are scheduled to be held in Slovenia on March 22, 2026.

This market will resolve to “Yes” if the listed political party is included in the first Slovenian government formed after the 2026 Slovenian parliamentary elections. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

This market may resolve once the first government is officially confirmed following a successful confirmation vote in the Slovenian National Assembly (Državni zbor), with ministers sworn in under non-caretaker circumstances.

A party will only be considered part of the coalition if it signs the coalition agreement and provides at least one cabinet minister. Parties that merely support the government (e.g., through confidence-and-supply arrangements, parliamentary support agreements, or similar) without signing the coalition agreement and holding a cabinet post will not qualify.

If no government is formed, or the results are not known definitively by January 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to “No”.

This market will resolve based on a consensus of credible reporting. In case of ambiguity, this market will resolve based on official information from the Government of Slovenia.

Parties that merely support the government (e.g., through confidence-and-supply arrangements, parliamentary support agreements, or similar) without signing the coalition agreement and holding a cabinet post will not qualify.

eventMetadata.context_description: Following Slovenia's March 22, 2026, parliamentary elections under proportional representation, no party secured the 46 seats needed for a majority in the 90-seat National Assembly, with Robert Golob's centre-left Freedom Movement (GS) taking 29 seats, Janez Janša's centre-right Slovenian Democratic Party (SDS) 28, New Slovenia-Christian Democrats (NSi)–Slovenian People's Party (SLS) 9, and Democrats (DEM) 6. Coalition talks stalled after Golob conceded failure on April 20; President Nataša Pirc Musar declined to nominate a prime minister-designate on April 25, urging parties to propose viable candidates. Recent momentum favors a centre-right bloc, as parliament passed an SDS-backed amendment trimming ministries from 19 to 14 with 49 votes last week, signaling potential majority support. Janša announced coalition guidelines aligned among SDS, NSi, and Democrats on May 5, with further negotiations underway ahead of a confirmation vote. Trader consensus reflects expectations of this alignment amid risks of snap elections if talks collapse by January 2027.

markets.question: Will Robinhood Markets, Inc. (HOOD) hit (LOW) $70 Week of May 4 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if, at any point during the week of May 4 2026, any 1-minute candle for Robinhood Markets, Inc. (HOOD) has a final "Low" price equal to or below the listed price. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

Only prices achieved during the regular trading hours of the primary exchange on which the listed security trades (typically 9:30 AM – 4:00 PM ET) will be considered. Prices occurring during pre-market or after-hours trading will not qualify.

Prices will be used exactly as published by Pyth, without rounding.

In the event of a stock split, reverse stock split, or similar corporate action affecting the listed company during the listed time frame, this market will resolve based on split-adjusted prices as displayed on Pyth.

The target price will be adjusted proportionally to reflect any stock splits. Resolution will be based on the historical price data as shown on Pyth after any adjustments have been applied.

The resolution source for this market is Pyth — specifically, the Robinhood Markets, Inc. (HOOD) "Low" prices available at https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.HOOD%2FUSD, with the chart settings configured for 1-minute candles.

Historical 1-minute candles may be accessed by appending a Unix timestamp (seconds) to the Pyth chart URL using the "t=" parameter. Any timestamp within the listed market time frame may be used to view the relevant candle data (e.g., https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.HOOD%2FUSD?t=1773432000)

If the relevant Pyth data is unavailable due to a system outage, data failure, or other technical disruption that prevents verification of the required 1-minute candle data, the official daily low price published by the primary exchange on which the listed security trades will be used to determine whether the listed price was reached during the applicable trading session.

markets.question: Will Mistral have the #2 AI model at the end of June 2026 (Style Control On)?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the company that owns the model that has the second-highest arena rank (Style Control On) based on the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard (https://lmarena.ai/) when the table under the "Leaderboard" tab is checked on June 30, 2026, 12:00 PM ET.

Results from the "Rank" column under the "Text Arena | Overall" Leaderboard tab at https://lmarena.ai/leaderboard/text with style control on will be used to resolve this market.

Models will be ordered primarily by their leaderboard rank at the market’s check time. If two or more models are tied on rank, they will be ordered by their Arena score, including any underlying, unrounded, granular values reflected in the data below the leaderboard. If a tie remains, alphabetical order of company names as listed in this market group will be used as a final tiebreaker (e.g., if the two models are tied by exact arena score, “Google” would be ranked ahead of “xAI”). This market will resolve based on the company that occupies second place under this ranking system.

The resolution source for this market is the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard found at https://lmarena.ai/. If this resolution source is unavailable at check time, this market will remain open until the leaderboard comes back online and will resolve based on the first check after it becomes available. If it becomes permanently unavailable, this market will resolve based on another resolution source.

markets.question: Will Adam Schiff be arrested before 2027?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the listed individual is arrested by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

A qualifying arrest/detention includes:
* Being taken into physical custody by law enforcement authorities (including federal, state, local, military, or international law enforcement)
* Voluntarily surrendering to law enforcement authorities in response to an arrest warrant
* Being formally booked or processed following detention
* Being handcuffed by a state authority and taken to a police station
* Surrendering at a police station or courthouse with their attorney
* Being placed under house arrest or electronic monitoring

The following scenarios will NOT qualify as an arrest/detention
* An arrest warrant being issued but not executed
* Being briefly detained but not arrested (e.g. such as in the South Korean judicial system when an individual is awaiting a judge’s decision on whether to grant a detention warrant)
* Being questioned or interviewed without arrest
* Being named in an indictment without arrest

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the arresting government and law enforcement, however a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

This market resolves according to the official coin toss result (the team recorded as having won the toss) as published by https://www.espncricinfo.com/.
If an official toss winner is recorded, the market will resolve based on that result even if the match is subsequently delayed, relocated, abandoned, or no ball is bowled.
If the match is postponed or rescheduled, the market will remain open and resolve according to the toss result for the listed fixture when it is eventually played.
If the fixture is permanently canceled, forfeited before any toss is conducted, or otherwise completed without an official toss winner being recorded, the market will resolve 50-50.

events.title: Indian Premier League: Sunrisers Hyderabad vs Punjab Kings

This market resolves according to the finalized match result as published by https://www.espncricinfo.com/.  

DLS/DRS, over-rate penalties, forfeit/walkover, or any other on-field ruling that leads the competition to declare a winner are treated as ordinary wins.

If the match ends tied and the playing conditions provide an on-field tiebreak (e.g., Super Over), the winner determined by that tiebreak will be used for resolution. If the match ends tied and no on-field tiebreak is used or available under the playing conditions (e.g., group-stage ODI with no Super Over), the market will resolve 50-50.

If the match is postponed/rescheduled, the market remains open until the listed fixture is completed. If the match is permanently canceled or abandoned or otherwise is completed without a winner, the market resolves 50-50.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. eventMetadata.context_description: Sunrisers Hyderabad host table-topping Punjab Kings in a high-stakes IPL clash at Rajiv Gandhi International Stadium, with SRH third on 12 points from 10 games eyeing PBKS's 13 from nine to seize top spot ahead of playoffs. Both sides rebound from recent losses—SRH's five-win streak snapped by KKR, PBKS's seven-game unbeaten run halted by back-to-back defeats to RR and GT—amid potent batting lineups on a flat, high-scoring pitch averaging 200 that favors chases. SRH hold a dominant 17-8 head-to-head edge, bolstered by Eshan Malinga's 12 wickets and Nitish Reddy's return from illness, while PBKS banking on Marcus Stoinis's fireworks and possible Shashank Singh comeback face bowling woes with Arshdeep's high economy. Toss and dew could prove decisive in this evenly poised contest.

markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the party of the candidate who wins the NY-21 congressional district seat in the U.S. House of Representatives in the 2026 midterm elections. The midterm elections will take place on November 4, 2026.

​A candidate's party will be determined by their ballot-listed or otherwise identifiable affiliation with that party at the time all of the 2026 House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources. A candidate without a ballot-listed affiliation to either the Democrat or Republican parties will be considered a member of one of these parties based on the party with which they most recently expressed their intent to caucus at the time all of the House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources.

This market will resolve based on the result of the election as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the United States government, specifically the Federal Election Commission (https://www.fec.gov/).

events.description:
This market will resolve according to the party of the candidate who wins the NY-21 congressional district seat in the U.S. House of Representatives in the 2026 midterm elections. The midterm elections will take place on November 4, 2026.

​A candidate's party will be determined by their ballot-listed or otherwise identifiable affiliation with that party at the time all of the 2026 House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources. A candidate without a ballot-listed affiliation to either the Democrat or Republican parties will be considered a member of one of these parties based on the party with which they most recently expressed their intent to caucus at the time all of the House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources.

eventMetadata.context_description: The open NY-21 seat, vacated by longtime Republican Rep. Elise Stefanik, favors the GOP per its R+10 Cook Partisan Voter Index and history of double-digit Republican victories, driving trader consensus to imply 65.5% odds for a Republican winner. Recent primary polling shows Anthony Constantino leading the crowded GOP field by wide margins, bolstered by former President Trump's April 21 endorsement bucking the state party's backing of Assemblyman Robert Smullen. Democrats face a fragmented primary with five candidates including Blake Gendebien and Paula Collins, lacking a clear frontrunner amid the district's conservative North Country base. June 23 primaries loom as the next key catalyst before the November 3 general election.

markets.question: Will Ethena reach $1.20 by December 31, 2026?
markets.description:
This market will immediately resolve to “Yes” if any Binance 1-minute candle for Ethena (ENA/USDT) between November 24, 2025, 15:45 and December 31, 2026, 23:59 in the ET timezone has a final “High” price equal to or greater than the price specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No.”

The resolution source for this market is Binance, specifically the ENA/USDT “High” prices available at:
https://www.binance.com/en/trade/ENA_USDT with the chart set to “1m” (one-minute candles) on the top bar.

Please note that the outcome of this market depends solely on the price data from the Binance ENA/USDT trading pair. Prices from other exchanges, different trading pairs, or spot markets will not be considered for the resolution of this market.
